nodes.label: AI as planning assistant for routine tasks

nodes.grounding_span: the chatbot ignores some of my requests

nodes.grounding_span: it usually takes a few back and fourths before I get a final draft

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for almost every task I can

nodes.label: Control over output
nodes.grounding_span: I will have to repeat that I did not want salmon on the menu

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for planning tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use it because I enjoy it

nodes.label: Frustration with AI ignoring specific requests
nodes.grounding_span: the chatbot ignores some of my requests

nodes.label: Openness to adopting AI for new tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If there were things that came up that AI could be helpful with, I would implement it

nodes.label: Comprehensive upfront specification with iterative correction
nodes.grounding_span: I give it as much information as I can up front, however, it usually takes a few back and fourths
